2013-T1-P2-S2.trunk: S+并列谓语：it must rely on …, order …, and use …（要做到…，H&M 就必须依赖低薪海外劳工、大批量订货、并使用大量有害化学品）
structure: 条件/目的状语（for+名词+to do）：For H&M to offer a $5.95 knit miniskirt in all its 2,300-plus stores around the world
主句：it must rely on low-wage overseas labor, order in volumes …, and use massive amounts of harmful chemicals
├ 三个并列谓语：rely on… / order in volumes… / use…
└ 定语从句〔that，修饰 volumes〕：that strain natural resources
2013-T1-P2-S2.logic: For H&M to offer… 是「for+名词+to do」作条件/目的状语（H&M 要想…就必须…）；主句 it 带三个并列谓语；that 定语从句修饰 volumes。
notes: For H&M to offer…：「for + 名词 + to do」作条件/目的状语。
主句三个并列谓语：must rely on…, order…, and use…。
order in volumes that strain natural resources：that 定语从句修饰 volumes（以消耗自然资源的量来订货）。

2013-T1-P3-S6.trunk: S+V+O：Cline believes lasting change can only be effected by the customer（克莱恩认为持久的改变只能由顾客促成）
structure: 让步状语从句(Though)：Though several fast-fashion companies have made efforts to curb their impact on labor and the environment
└ 不定式作定语〔修饰 efforts〕：to curb their impact on labor and the environment
破折号插入语（举例）：including H&M, with its green Conscious Collection line
主句：Cline believes lasting change can only be effected by the customer
└ 宾语从句(省略 that)：lasting change can only be effected by the customer
2013-T1-P3-S6.logic: Though 引导让步状语从句；破折号插入举例（including H&M…）；主句 Cline believes (that)…，宾语从句为被动 can only be effected by the customer。
notes: Though 引导让步状语从句（尽管）。
破折号夹的 including H&M… 是插入语（举例）。
can only be effected by the customer 被动（只能由顾客促成）；effect 作动词=促成、实现。

2013-T1-P1-S6.trunk: S+V+O+宾补(to do)：These labels encourage … consumers to see … and to renew …（这些品牌怂恿消费者把衣服当一次性的、并每隔几周更新衣橱）
structure: 主句：These labels encourage style-conscious consumers to see clothes as disposable … and to renew their wardrobe every few weeks
├ encourage sb to do（两个并列不定式）：to see clothes as disposable / to renew their wardrobe
└ 破折号插入：meant to last only a wash or two, although they don't advertise that
├ 过去分词作定语〔补充 disposable〕：meant to last only a wash or two
└ 让步状语从句(although)：although they don't advertise that
2013-T1-P1-S6.logic: encourage sb to do 结构，两个并列不定式 to see… and to renew…；破折号插入补充 disposable 的含义（meant to last… 过去分词 + although 让步）。
notes: encourage sb to do：两个并列不定式 to see… and to renew…（被破折号插入隔开）。
meant to last only a wash or two：过去分词作定语补充 disposable（意在只洗一两次就丢）。
see A as B 把 A 看作 B；although they don't advertise that 让步插入（尽管商家不明说）。
